overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking along a dystopian city sidewalk at dusk. The scene features industrial architecture with smokestacks, elevated highways, neon billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic in a hazy, warm-lit urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district sidewalk with smokestacks and elevated transit

events.description: dark colored sedan drives past on the left side road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk with smokestacks visible ahead in the distance

entered.detail: tall smokestacks emitting dark smoke into the orange dusk sky
raised metal transit structure running parallel to the street
low-rise industrial building with corrugated metal facade
metal railing separating sidewalk from multi-lane road
tall wooden poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a concrete sidewalk in an industrial district at dusk. Tall smokestacks emit dark smoke into the hazy orange sky ahead, while an elevated metro track runs parallel on the right. A traffic barrier separates the walkway from the multi-lane road where a sedan passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with large digital advertisements

events.description: large digital billboard displaying 'BUBBLES GIN' advertisement becomes visible on right building

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the first pedestrians come into view ahead in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement with red and blue graphics and white text
large curved exhaust pipes attached to building facade

segments.scene_description: As the player progresses, a massive digital billboard advertising 'BUBBLES GIN' dominates the right side of the frame. The industrial chimneys appear closer now, and the first pedestrians become visible walking ahead on the sidewalk. Large industrial pipes curve along the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial corridor approaching Delamain facility

events.description: crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians walking ahead toward the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching a busier section with several pedestrians while the Delamain sign becomes visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket standing near the traffic barrier looking at the road

entered.detail: large corporate sign with 'D' logo and 'DELAMAIN' text hanging over the road
illuminated screen showing a person's face in advertisement

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians as the player approaches a major intersection. The Delamain corporate sign becomes visible in the distance, hanging over the road. A pedestrian in an orange jacket stands near the barrier on the left, and traffic density increases on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with corporate signage and heavy traffic

events.description: camera turns left to observe the heavy traffic flow on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: slowing near the intersection and turning to look at the dense traffic while the Delamain sign looms overhead

notable_agents.action: stream of cars and trucks moving along the road with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated corporate logos on their facades
tall palm tree visible near the highway overpass

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the busy intersection dominated by the Delamain sign overhead. The camera turns left to observe heavy traffic flowing on the multi-lane road, with corporate towers rising in the background. The elevated metro track passes directly overhead as pedestrians continue walking toward the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a hazy industrial district that gradually transitions into a bustling corporate intersection at dusk. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath an orange sky, moving past tall smokestacks and an elevated metro track while a lone sedan passes on the adjacent road. As the camera progresses, the industrial landscape intensifies with curving pipes and a massive Bubbles Gin billboard dominating the view, while the first few pedestrians appear ahead. The scene then opens into a more crowded urban space as the player approaches a major crossing, where a pedestrian in an orange jacket stands near the barrier and the Delamain corporate sign emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera reaches the busy intersection and turns left to observe heavy traffic flowing beneath the overhead metro track, with towering corporate skyscrapers rising against the horizon.
